zh.lifeSummary: 當Eudette de Champlitte於大約1194年出生在艾歐洛時，她的父親Eudes II de Champlitte40歲，母親Emmeline de Broyes Comtessa de Forez18歲。她於1194年與Hugo II Zeger van Gent結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1231年6月之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eudette de Champlitte于大约1194年出生在艾歐洛时，她的父亲Eudes II de Champlitte40岁，母亲Emmeline de Broyes Comtessa de Forez18岁。她于1194年与Hugo II Zeger van Gent结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1231年6月之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eudette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Laurent, Marcel, Normand, Pierre, Adrien, Alcide, Aurore, Emile, Fernand, Flore.
Altered form of French Audet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Odette .
History: The progenitor of the Audettes was Nicolas Audet dit Lapointe from France (see Audet ).

variants.name: Audet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Pierre, Alain, Alphonse, Emile, Marcel, Michel, Normand, Benoit, Camil, Donat, Edouard.
French: derivative of the ancient Germanic personal name Aldo, based on the element ald ‘old’. Compare Audette and Odette .

History: Nicolas Audet dit Lapointe, a soldier from Maulais in the Poitou region of France, is recorded in Île d'Orleans, QC, in 1670, when he married Madeleine Després. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Audette and Odette, and the former secondary surname Lapointe .

en.lifeSummary: When Eudette de Champlitte was born about 1194, in Europe, her father, Eudes II de Champlitte, was 40 and her mother, Emmeline de Broyes Comtessa de Forez, was 18. She married Hugo II Zeger van Gent in 1194. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died after June 1231.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eudette de Champlitte est née environ 1194, à Europe, son père, Eudes II de Champlitte, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Emmeline de Broyes Comtessa de Forez, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Hugo II Zeger van Gent en 1194. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après juin 1231.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eudette de Champlitte um 1194 in Europa geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eudes II de Champlitte 40 und ihre Mutter Emmeline de Broyes Comtessa de Forez 18. Sie hat 1194 Hugo II Zeger van Gent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach Juni 1231.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eudette de Champlitte è nata il circa 1194 nel Europa, sua padre, Eudes II de Champlitte, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Emmeline de Broyes Comtessa de Forez, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Hugo II Zeger van Gent nel 1194. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il giugno 1231.

ja.lifeSummary: Eudette de Champlitteが約1194年にヨーロッパで生まれた時，父Eudes II de Champlitteは40歳，母Emmeline de Broyes Comtessa de Forezは18歳であった。1194年にHugo II Zeger van Gentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1231年6月以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eudette de Champlitte(이)가 대략 1194년 우럽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eudes II de Champlitte(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emmeline de Broyes Comtessa de Forez(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1194년 Hugo II Zeger van Gent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1231년 6월 이후 사망했다.

mn.ABT 1194–after June 1231: ойролцоогоор 1194 он–1231 оны Зургаадугаар сараас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eudette de Champlitte nasceu aproximadamente 1194, em Europa, seu pai, Eudes II de Champlitte, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Emmeline de Broyes Comtessa de Forez, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugo II Zeger van Gent em 1194. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após junho de 1231.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eudette de Champlitte родилась около 1194 г. в местности Европа, её отцу по имени Eudes II de Champlitte было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Emmeline de Broyes Comtessa de Forez, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugo II Zeger van Gent в 1194 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла после июнь 1231 г.

sm.ABT 1194–after June 1231: e tusa o le 1194–ina ua ma'ea le Iuni 1231

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eudette de Champlitte nació aproximadamente 1194, en Europa, su papá, Eudes II de Champlitte, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Emmeline de Broyes Comtessa de Forez, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Hugo II Zeger van Gent en 1194. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de junio de 1231.
